creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
Doesn't build under RELENG_3 because it has g++ 2.7.2.3, needs egcs.
Also, update to pre5 which has Vorbis file support.
Also, pkg-plist was abc sorted.

Fix: Please apply versus 1.2 cvs revision of Makefil, since there was ports/22581
which could have got commited.
If it wasn't committed, then this patch closes it.
